meaning: n.菲利斯女子名,乡村姑娘
examples: Phyllis and her helpers provided us with refreshment.
In the evening I returned to tell Phyllis I got the job.
Phyllis Lamphere was out of town and unavailable for comment.
No information would be provided about Knight's next steps, said MetroHealth Medical Center spokeswoman Phyllis Marino.
Two years later, the first of her five comedy albums, "Phyllis Diller Laughs, " was released.
